title: Palabishegam Lyrics Pistha
stanzas:
pal abishegam saamikku
nei abishegam saamikku
malar abishegam saamikku
thaen abishegam saamikku
sandhana abishegam saamikku
avulum malarum saamikku
muthina thaenga saamikku
karpoora deepam saamikku
kannikkum saamikku
ellaam ellaam saamikku

vizhiyaavum oliyaana
guruve en swami
unai paadum
uyir nadham
saranam ayyappaa

vazhiyaavum thuniayaaga
varugindra saashthaan
maname un malar peedam
saranam ayyappaa

sutha sudar maniye
ayyappaa
bakthi pasunganiye
ayyappaa
nithap pournamiye
ayyappaa
sithak kulirpaniye
ayyappaa

arulvizhi malarmugam
adhu enthan manasugam
isai enum ezhu swaram
enakadhu pugal tharum
manikanda mandhiram
ulagil nirandharam

..
...thatta
bagiranga mutta
undhan anbu mottuvida
thunbam vittuvida
enna kattupada
inban vattamida
siva siva saivamum
hari hari vainavam
ivai ini valamvarum
azhagiya thiruthalam
oru malaiye
guru malaiye
arivaai
adhai adainthaal
thuyarillaye
podhuvaai
sivan magane
thiru oliyaai varuvaai

swamiyappa ayyappa
saranam appa ayyappaa
vangala raja ayyappaa
padham vaasaa ayyyappaa

seo.title: Palabishegam Lyrics Pistha
seo.description: Full Palabishegam songs lyrics, Pistha Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Kavignar Kalidasan, Music: S.A.Rajkumar, Singer(s): Unnikrishnan.
seo.keywords: Kavignar Kalidasan, Pistha, S.A.Rajkumar, Unnikrishnan, Palabishegam full lyrics, Pistha songs lyrics, Palabishegam lyrics snippets, Palabishegam WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Palabishegam lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Palabishegam'?

The song 'Palabishegam' is a devotional piece that expresses reverence and devotion to the divine, highlighting various offerings made to the deity.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Pistha'?

In the movie Pistha, this song is used to depict a spiritual moment, emphasizing the protagonist's connection with faith and devotion.

Who is the singer of 'Palabishegam'?

The song is sung by the talented Unnikrishnan, known for his melodious voice and ability to convey deep emotions through music.

Who composed the music for 'Palabishegam'?

The music for 'Palabishegam' was composed by S.A. Rajkumar, a renowned music director in the Tamil film industry.

When was 'Palabishegam' released?

'Palabishegam' was released on May 9, 1997, as part of the movie Pistha.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Palabishegam' from the movie Pistha is a heartfelt devotional track that evokes a sense of peace and spirituality. It beautifully captures the essence of devotion through its lyrics and melody, making it a perfect offering during religious occasions. Unnikrishnan's soothing vocals, combined with S.A. Rajkumar's enchanting composition, create an uplifting atmosphere. This song resonates deeply with listeners, encouraging reflection and connection with the divine.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Palabishegam from Pistha is a soul-stirring devotional track that beautifully showcases Unnikrishnan's mesmerizing vocals. The collaboration with lyricist Kavignar Kalidasan and music director S.A. Rajkumar creates an enchanting atmosphere that resonates with the divine. This song is perfect for those seeking a moment of peace and reflection.
stanzaMeanings: Offering of ghee to the Lord, flowers to the Lord, honey to the Lord, incense to the Lord, everything to the Lord, including the fragrant flowers, the pearl-like fruits, the camphor lamp, and all offerings.
This is our day, this is our day, we seek refuge in Ayyappa, we seek refuge in Ayyappa.
O Guru, who shines with light, my Lord, your song is the life melody, we seek refuge in Ayyappa.
Coming along the path, with devotion in my heart, your flower feet, we seek refuge in Ayyappa.
Pure and bright, O Ayyappa, you are the essence of devotion, you are the full moon, you are the cool breeze, O Ayyappa.
We seek refuge in Ayyappa, O Lord Ayyappa.
This is our day, this is our day, we seek refuge in Ayyappa, we seek refuge in Ayyappa.
A thousand suns are coming together, shining like a great light.
Like a lamp that dispels darkness, I offer my love with a pure heart.
I do not know my origin, O Lord Ayyappa.
I do not know my endings, O Lord Ayyappa.
Living life is only possible with Ayyappa's grace, we will be free.
The flower-faced one, that is my happiness, the music that gives me joy, will bring me blessings in this world forever.
We seek refuge in Ayyappa, O Lord Ayyappa.
This is our day, this is our day, we seek refuge in Ayyappa, we seek refuge in Ayyappa.
O Harihara, the son of the divine, you are the one who brings joy.
O Lord Ayyappa, we seek refuge in you, O Ayyappa.
With a beautiful face, come, come, O Lord of the Kali Yuga.
O Lord Ayyappa, we seek refuge in you, O Ayyappa.
The lotus of devotion will not wilt.
With devotion, it will not break, it will sing every day.
In a world without the moon, you will shine, O Manikanda Guru.
O Lord, we seek refuge in Ayyappa.

Your love will not let me suffer, it will bring me joy, O Shiva, O Hari, may these blessings come to me, O beautiful Lord, if I hold on to this, there will be no sorrow, O son of Shiva, you will come as the divine light.
Every day you will grant grace.
O Lord, we seek refuge in Ayyappa.
O Lord Ayyappa, we seek refuge in you, O Ayyappa, come, O King Ayyappa, let us reside in your presence, O Ayyappa.
O Lord, O Ayyappa, O Lord,
O Lord, we seek refuge in Ayyappa.
This is our day, this is our day, we seek refuge in Ayyappa, we seek refuge in Ayyappa.
